steps: Identify the predicate attributes of eastbound and westbound trains (e.g. has_car, car_num, car_color, car_len, has_wall)
Formulate a Prolog rule of the form 'eastbound(T) :- Body.' that covers all positive (eastbound) examples and excludes all negative (westbound) examples
Aim for the shortest correct rule using the fewest body literals
Strictly use the defined Prolog predicates and constants
Avoid introducing unbound or unneeded variables
constraints: Body must use defined predicates only
